conflict: He asserts that Tomas's martyr story is false, then alternates between morphine haze, evasions, and deliberate provocation.
consequence: Marisol decides to investigate the contradiction instead of dismissing it, and she tells sponsor Luis before craving escalates.
must_land_beats: Interview room pressure comes from silence and interrupted speech, not action set pieces.
Salvador says the family has been painting halos over burns.
Marisol nearly walks to a liquor store but reroutes to an AA check-in.
Luis requires documentary evidence before confrontation.
objective: Test whether Salvador's first claims are credible enough to pursue.
